nasb.text: He remembers his nobles; They stumble in their march, They hurry to her wall, And the mantelet is set up.

esv.text: He remembers his officers; they stumble as they go, they hasten to the wall; the siege tower is set up.

cnv.text: 亞述王召集他的權臣， 他們跌跌撞撞而來， 急急忙忙走上城牆， 豎起了防禦的擋牌。

ccb.text: 亚述王召集将领， 他们一路跌跌撞撞， 奔上城墙，架起防御盾牌。
